scripts.dev:refresh-catalog: docker compose up --build -d --no-deps medusa && docker compose exec medusa npx medusa exec ./src/scripts/seed.ts && docker compose up --build -d --no-deps storefront
scripts.dev:refresh-seed: docker compose up --build -d --no-deps medusa && docker compose exec medusa npx medusa exec ./src/scripts/seed.ts
scripts.dev:refresh-inventory: docker compose up --build -d --no-deps medusa && docker compose exec medusa npx medusa exec ./src/scripts/seed.ts && bash scripts/backfill-medusa-inventory.sh && docker compose up --build -d --no-deps storefront
